name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
description: Cover page for the Common Paper Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement. Parties fill in their details and sign this page; it incorporates the Mutual NDA standard terms by reference.

name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA)
description: Standard terms for the Common Paper Mutual NDA, created by a committee of over 40 attorneys representing technology vendors, procurement teams, boutique firms, and Big Law. Covers mutual confidentiality obligations between two parties.

name: Cloud Service Agreement (CSA)
description: Common Paper standard agreement for selling and buying cloud software and SaaS products. Covers subscription terms, order forms, acceptable use, data handling, and service obligations.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Common Paper standard agreement for early-stage design partnership arrangements, where a vendor works closely with a customer to co-develop or refine a product before general availability.

name: Service Level Agreement (SLA)
description: Common Paper standard SLA designed to accompany the Cloud Service Agreement (CSA). Defines uptime commitments, service credits, and remedies for service interruptions.

name: Professional Services Agreement (PSA)
description: Common Paper standard agreement for professional services engagements. Covers statements of work, deliverables, intellectual property ownership, and payment terms.

name: Data Processing Agreement (DPA)
description: Common Paper standard Data Processing Agreement for vendor-customer relationships involving the processing of personal data. Addresses GDPR and other data protection regulatory requirements.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Common Paper standard agreement for licensing on-premise or downloadable software. Covers license grants, restrictions, support, and warranty terms.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Common Paper standard agreement for formalising a business partnership between two companies, covering roles, revenue sharing, intellectual property, and termination.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Common Paper standard short-term pilot or trial agreement allowing a prospective customer to evaluate a product or service before committing to a full commercial contract such as a CSA or Software License Agreement.

name: Business Associate Agreement (BAA)
description: Common Paper standard HIPAA Business Associate Agreement for vendors that handle protected health information (PHI) on behalf of a covered entity or another business associate.

name: AI Addendum
description: Common Paper standard addendum to be attached to an existing agreement (such as a CSA or Software License Agreement) to address AI-specific provisions including model use, data training, outputs, and liability.
